step_rationale: Ischemia-associated acylcarnitine; marker of disrupted cardiac energetics.
mechanism: C14:1-OH accumulates during myocardial ischemia due to impaired fatty-acid β-oxidation and reflects cardiomyocyte metabolic stress.

references.title: Pilot study of myocardial ischemia-induced metabolomic changes in emergency department patients undergoing stress testing.
